title: afrafzelia africana
intro: Afrafzelia africana, also known as African teak, is a medium-sized tree native to tropical Africa, prized for its durable and versatile wood. The medicinal properties of Afrafzelia africana include its ability to treat fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions due to the presence of flavonoids and terpenoids. The health benefits of this plant include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which can help to reduce inflammation and protect against cell damage. Afrafzelia africana can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or decoction, and is also used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments.
